phoenix.name: Phoenix
phoenix.uniqueContext: Arizona's capital and largest city. Sprawling metro means more residential moves. High population = more gun owners needing safe transport.
phoenix.safeRelevance: With 1.64M residents and 46% gun ownership, Phoenix has an estimated 300,000+ households with firearms requiring secure storage.

scottsdale.name: Scottsdale
scottsdale.uniqueContext: Affluent community with higher-end homes and collections. Scottsdale residents often own premium safes (Liberty, Fort Knox, Browning Presidential).
scottsdale.safeRelevance: Median income 36% above Phoenix means more high-value collections. Scottsdale's $725K median home value = permanent safe installations, not rentals.

mesa.name: Mesa
mesa.uniqueContext: Third-largest city in Arizona. Strong Mormon community with family-oriented neighborhoods. Growing tech presence (Apple, Boeing facilities).
mesa.safeRelevance: Mesa's 198K households with 46% gun ownership = ~91,000 gun-owning households. Fast-growing Eastmark and Las Sendas communities driving new safe deliveries.

gilbert.name: Gilbert
gilbert.uniqueContext: Named America's safest city multiple times. High homeownership (73%) means permanent safe installations. This is where Ryan is based.
gilbert.safeRelevance: Gilbert's $122K median income is highest in the East Valley. Families investing in quality safes for firearms, documents, and valuables.

chandler.name: Chandler
chandler.uniqueContext: Major tech hub - Intel's largest US facility is here. High-income tech workers often have premium safe collections.
chandler.safeRelevance: Chandler's tech corridor attracts high earners. Intel campus alone employs 12,000+. Tech workers = disposable income for quality safe storage.

tempe.name: Tempe
tempe.uniqueContext: College town with ASU (70K+ students). Mix of young professionals and established families. Lower homeownership due to rental market.
tempe.safeRelevance: South Tempe and Warner Ranch have established homeowners with permanent safe needs. ASU staff and faculty often own firearms.

glendale.name: Glendale
glendale.uniqueContext: Home to Luke Air Force Base. Military families and veterans have higher-than-average gun ownership and safe needs.
glendale.safeRelevance: Luke AFB connection means strong military/veteran presence. Veterans have 40%+ gun ownership rate. Arrowhead Ranch = higher-income families.

peoria.name: Peoria
peoria.uniqueContext: Growing northwest valley community. Vistancia and Lake Pleasant areas attracting families from California and Midwest.
peoria.safeRelevance: Active adult communities + family neighborhoods. Many relocating from states with different storage laws - need proper Arizona setup.
